title: Easy Flush Call
explanation: You have a Flush Draw (9 outs ~ 36%). The bet is tiny ($20 into $100). The price is ~16%. 36% > 16%. Easy Call.

title: Expensive Gutshot
explanation: You have a Gutshot (4 outs ~ 16%). Opponent bet huge (Pot Sized). Price is 33%. 16% < 33%. Fold immediately.

title: OESD vs Min-Bet
explanation: You have a massive draw (8 outs). The bet is tiny. You can Call, but RAISING is better here to pressure them.
